title: Craftable OP chests
description: Adds craft-able chests with custom loot tables that scale based on material used! Perfect for manhunts, op loot videos, and whacky gaming!
body:
OP Chests is a lightweight Paper plugin that adds fully custom, overpowered loot chests to your server.
Players can craft special chests that explode with randomized OP loot when placed — perfect for manhunts, SMP events, or chaotic progression servers.
This plugin is designed for Paper 1.21.10+ and uses custom recipes + persistent data tags to ensure every OP Chest behaves consistently.

🎁 Features
- Craftable OP Chests with custom recipes
- Tier‑based loot generation
- Nearly every slot filled with powerful items
- Randomized stack sizes (not always 64)
- Chests break and drop their loot (not the chest itself)
- Supports shift‑click bulk crafting
- Prevents renaming to avoid spoofing
- Works in single or double‑chest form
- Perfect for manhunts, SMPs, and chaos servers

⚠️ Important: Paper Double‑Chest Bug
Due to a known Paper issue, single chests do not always fire inventory events correctly when filled instantly.
Workaround:
👉 Place two OP Chests next to each other to form a double chest.
Double chests always generate loot correctly and drop the full contents when broken.
This is a Paper bug, not a plugin bug — and the workaround is 100% reliable.
**
When an OP Chest is placed:
- It waits briefly
- Fills all 27 or 54 slots with randomized OP loot
- Loot includes weapons, armor, tools, blocks, food, and rare items
- Stack sizes vary for chaos and balance
- Breaking the chest drops only the loot, not the chest
Double chests produce 54 items, fully packed.

🧭 Perfect For
- Manhunts
- SMP progression
- Chaos events
- Custom challenges
- Speedrun modifiers
- PvP loot drops

📦 Installation
- Drop the .jar into your plugins folder
- Restart the server
- Craft OP Chests and enjoy
- Recipies :D
MMM
MCM
MMM


Where:
- M = the tier material
- C = a normal chest
Produces 1 OP Chest tagged with that tier.
Supports shift‑click crafting.

🎁 Loot Tables by Tier
Below is the full breakdown of every tier and its loot behavior.

🟫 Coal OP Chest
Loot includes:
- Coal blocks
- Coal
Simple starter tier. Nearly full chest.

🟧 Copper OP Chest
Loot includes:
- Copper blocks
- Copper ingots
- Copper items (equipment) — 1 equipment item per chest

⚪ Iron OP Chest
Loot includes:
- Iron blocks
- Iron ingots
- Iron equipment — 1 equipment item per chest
- Diamond Pickaxe (Efficiency V, Unbreaking III, Fortune III)

🟨 Gold OP Chest
Loot includes:
- Gold blocks
- Gold ingots
- Golden apples
- Enchanted golden apples (up to 5 per chest)

🔵 Lapis OP Chest
Loot includes:
- Lapis blocks
- Lapis
- ~500 XP bottles
- Full diamond armor (max enchantments)
- Enchanted books:
- Mending
- Unbreaking III
- Sharpness V
- Fire Aspect II
- Protection IV
- Efficiency V
- Silk Touch
- Fortune III
- Feather Falling IV
- Depth Strider (max)
- Wind Burst III
- Breach IV
- Density V
- All other max‑level armor & weapon books
- Anvils
- Grindstones

🔷 Lapis Block OP Chest
Loot includes:
- Over‑enchanted gear (diamond + elytras)
- Random enchantments up to level 10
- Extremely chaotic tier

💎 Diamond OP Chest
Loot includes:
- Totems of Undying
- Diamond blocks
- Diamonds
- Golden apples
- Enchanted golden apples (up to 7 per chest)

🟪 Ancient Debris OP Chest
Loot includes:
- Netherite ingots
- Netherite upgrader
- Golden apples
- Enchanted golden apples (up to 10)
- Elytra
- Totem of Undying
- One full stack each of:
- Netherite blocks
- Gold blocks
- Diamond blocks
- Emerald blocks
- Iron blocks
- Lapis blocks

⬛ Netherite Block OP Chest
Loot includes:
- Totems of Undying
- Netherite blocks
- Elytra
- Golden apples
- Enchanted golden apples (up to 20)
- XP bottles
- Shulker boxes
- Blaze rods
- Breeze rods
- Heavy Cores
- Nether wart

🌀 Heavy Core OP Chest
Loot includes:
- Wind charges
- Breeze rods
- Ender pearls
- Golden apples
- Mace
- Enchanted books:
- Wind Burst I–III
- Density V
- Breach IV
- Fire Aspect II

🔥 Blaze Rod OP Chest
Loot includes:
- Nether wart
- Blaze rods
- Glowstone
- Gunpowder
- Magma cream
- All ingredients needed for:
- Weakness
- Strength
- Speed
- Fire Resistance
- Slowness
- Turtle Master

💚 Emerald OP Chest
Loot includes:
- Emerald blocks
- Emeralds
- Enchanted golden apples

📦 Chest Behavior
- When placed, the chest fills instantly with loot
- Breaking the chest drops only the loot, not the chest
- Double chests produce 54 slots of OP items
- Stack sizes vary for chaos and balance
